|target|<a href="#targetdto" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">TargetDto</a>|Target of Browser Monitor step. |
|type<sup>*required</sup>|"CLICK" &#124; "COOKIE" &#124; "JAVASCRIPT" &#124; "KEYSTROKES" &#124; "NAVIGATE" &#124; "SELECT_OPTION" &#124; "TAP"|<p>Defines the actual set of fields depending on the value. See one of the following objects:</p> <ul> <li><code>NAVIGATE</code> -&gt; NavigateStepDto</li> <li><code>CLICK</code> -&gt; InteractionStepDto</li> <li><code>TAP</code> -&gt; InteractionStepDto</li> <li><code>KEYSTROKES</code> -&gt; KeyStrokesStepDto</li> <li><code>JAVASCRIPT</code> -&gt; JavaScriptStepDto</li> <li><code>SELECT_OPTION</code> -&gt; SelectOptionStepDto</li> <li><code>COOKIE</code> -&gt; CookieStepDto</li> </ul>  |
|url<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|Field containing the url that the monitor should navigate to. |
|validationRules|Array&lt;<a href="#validationruledto">ValidationRuleDto</a>&gt;|List of validation rules for the step to perform. |
|waitCondition|<a href="#basewaitconditiondto" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">BaseWaitConditionDto</a>|Wait condition for Browser Monitor step. |

### NetworkThrottlingDto

Network throttling of a Browser Monitor.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|download|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|Download throughput. If not defined in request, it will be set to -1 by default. |
|latency|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|Latency. If not defined in request, it will be set to 0 by default. |
|name|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|Predefined network type. If not defined in request, it will be set to &quot;&quot; by default. |
|upload|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|Upload throughput. If not defined in request, it will be set to -1 by default. |

### NetworkZone

Configuration of a network zone.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|alternativeZones|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|A list of alternative network zones. |
|description|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|A short description of the network zone. |
|fallbackMode|"NONE" &#124; "ANY_ACTIVE_GATE" &#124; "ONLY_DEFAULT_ZONE"|The fallback mode of the network zone. |
|id|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The ID of the network zone. |
|numOfConfiguredActiveGates|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The number of ActiveGates in the network zone. |
|numOfConfiguredOneAgents|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The number of OneAgents that are configured to use the network zone as primary. |
|numOfOneAgentsFromOtherZones|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|<p>The number of OneAgents from other network zones that are using ActiveGates in the network zone.</p> <p>This is a fraction of <strong>numOfOneAgentsUsing</strong>.</p> <p>One possible reason for switching to another zone is that a firewall is preventing a OneAgent from connecting to any ActiveGate in the preferred network zone.</p>  |
|numOfOneAgentsUsing|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The number of OneAgents that are using ActiveGates in the network zone. |
|overridesGlobal|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Indicates if a global network zone is overridden (managed only). |
|scope|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|Specifies the scope of the network zone (managed only). |

### NetworkZoneConnectionStatistics

Runtime information about host connections.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|hostsConfiguredButNotConnected|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|Hosts from the network zone that use other zones. |
|hostsConnectedAsAlternative|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|Hosts that use the network zone as an alternative. |
|hostsConnectedAsFailover|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|Hosts from other zones that use the zone (not configured as an alternative) even though ActiveGates of higher priority are available. |
|hostsConnectedAsFailoverWithoutActiveGates|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|Hosts from other zones that use the zone (not configured as an alternative) and <strong>no</strong> ActiveGates of higher priority are available. |

### NetworkZoneList

A list of network zones.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|networkZones<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;<a href="#networkzone">NetworkZone</a>&gt;|A list of network zones. |

### NetworkZoneSettings

Global network zone configuration.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|networkZonesEnabled|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Network zones feature is enabled (<code>true</code>) or disabled (<code>false</code>). |

### Node

Configuration of a synthetic node.

 A *synthetic node* is an ActiveGate that is able to execute synthetic monitors.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|activeGateVersion<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The version of the Active Gate. |
|autoUpdateEnabled<sup>*required</sup>|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|The Active Gate has the Auto update option enabled ('true') or not ('false') |
|browserMonitorsEnabled<sup>*required</sup>|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|The synthetic node is able to execute browser monitors (<code>true</code>) or not (<code>false</code>). |
|browserType<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The browser type. |
|browserVersion<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The browser version. |
|capabilities<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|The list of node's capabilities. |
|entityId<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The ID of the synthetic node. |
|healthCheckStatus<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The health check status of the synthetic node. |
|hostname<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The hostname of the synthetic node. |
|ips<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|The IP of the synthetic node. |
|oneAgentRoutingEnabled<sup>*required</sup>|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|The Active Gate has the One Agent routing enabled ('true') or not ('false'). |
|operatingSystem<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The Active Gate's host operating system. |
|playerVersion<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The version of the synthetic player. |
|status<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The status of the synthetic node. |
|version<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The version of the synthetic node. |

### NodeCollectionElement

The short representation of a synthetic object. Only contains the ID and the display name.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|activeGateVersion<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The version of the Active Gate. |
|autoUpdateEnabled<sup>*required</sup>|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|The Active Gate has the Auto update option enabled ('true') or not ('false') |
|browserMonitorsEnabled<sup>*required</sup>|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Browser check capabilities enabled flag. |
|capabilities<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|The list of node's capabilities. |
|entityId<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The ID of a node. |
|healthCheckStatus<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The health check status of the synthetic node. |
|hostname<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The hostname of a node. |
|ips<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|The IP of a node. |
|oneAgentRoutingEnabled<sup>*required</sup>|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|The Active Gate has the One Agent routing enabled ('true') or not ('false'). |
|operatingSystem<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The Active Gate's host operating system. |
|playerVersion<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The version of the synthetic player. |
|status<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The status of the synthetic node. |
|version<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The version of a node |

### Nodes

A list of synthetic nodes

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|nodes<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;<a href="#nodecollectionelement" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">NodeCollectionElement</a>&gt;|A list of synthetic nodes |

### ObjectsList

A list of settings objects.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|items<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;<a href="#settingsobject">SettingsObject</a>&gt;|A list of settings objects. |
|nextPageKey|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|<p>The cursor for the next page of results. Has the value of <code>null</code> on the last page.</p> <p>Use it in the <strong>nextPageKey</strong> query parameter to obtain subsequent pages of the result.</p>  |
|pageSize<sup>*required</sup>|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The number of entries per page. |
|totalCount<sup>*required</sup>|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The total number of entries in the result. |

### PlainAuthenticationDto

Plain authentication dto for Browser Monitor step.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|authServerAllowlist|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|String containing the allowed servers of KERBEROS authentication. Can be defined only for <code>KERBEROS</code> authentication type. |
|domain|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|String containing the KERBEROS authentication domain. Can be defined only for <code>KERBEROS</code> authentication type. |
|inputType<sup>*required</sup>|"PLAIN" &#124; "SECURE"|<p>Defines the actual set of fields depending on the value. See one of the following objects:</p> <ul> <li><code>SECURE</code> -&gt; SecureAuthenticationDto</li> <li><code>PLAIN</code> -&gt; PlainAuthenticationDto</li> </ul>  |
|password<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|String containing the password. |
|type<sup>*required</sup>|"HTTP_AUTHENTICATION" &#124; "KERBEROS" &#124; "WEBFORM"|Type of authentication. |
|username<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|String containing the username. |

### PlainKeystrokesInputDto

Credential-based input for keystrokes step.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|masked|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Boolean value set to true if key strokes should be masked. If not defined in request, the default value will be set to false. |
|textValue<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|String value containing the text. |
|type<sup>*required</sup>|"PLAIN" &#124; "SECURE"|<p>Defines the actual set of fields depending on the value. See one of the following objects:</p> <ul> <li><code>SECURE</code> -&gt; SecureKeystrokesInputDto</li> <li><code>PLAIN</code> -&gt; PlainKeystrokesInputDto</li> </ul>  |

### Precondition

A precondition for visibility of a property.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|expectedValue|AnyValue|<p>The expected value of the property.</p> <p>Only applicable to properties of the <code>EQUALS</code> type.</p>  |
|expectedValues|Array&lt;AnyValue&gt;|<p>A list of valid values of the property.</p> <p>Only applicable to properties of the <code>IN</code> type.</p>  |
|pattern|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|<p>The Regular expression which is matched against the property.</p> <p>Only applicable to properties of the <code>REGEX_MATCH</code> type.</p>  |
|precondition|<a href="#precondition" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Precondition</a>|A precondition for visibility of a property. |
|preconditions|Array&lt;<a href="#precondition">Precondition</a>&gt;|<p>A list of child preconditions to be evaluated.</p> <p>Only applicable to properties of the <code>AND</code> and <code>OR</code> types.</p>  |
|property|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The property to be evaluated. |
|type<sup>*required</sup>|"EQUALS" &#124; "AND" &#124; "IN" &#124; "NOT" &#124; "NULL" &#124; "OR" &#124; "REGEX_MATCH"|The type of the precondition. |

### PrivateSyntheticLocation

Configuration of a private synthetic location.

 Some fields are inherited from the base *SyntheticLocation* object.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|autoUpdateChromium|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Non-containerized location property. Auto upgrade of Chromium is enabled (<code>true</code>) or disabled (<code>false</code>). |
|availabilityLocationOutage|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Alerting for location outage is enabled (<code>true</code>) or disabled (<code>false</code>). Supported only for private Synthetic locations. |
|availabilityNodeOutage|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Alerting for node outage is enabled (<code>true</code>) or disabled (<code>false</code>). \\n\\n If enabled, the outage of <em>any</em> node in the location triggers an alert. Supported only for private Synthetic locations. |
|availabilityNotificationsEnabled|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Notifications for location and node outage are enabled (<code>true</code>) or disabled (<code>false</code>). Supported only for private Synthetic locations. |
|browserExecutionSupported|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|<p>Containerized location property. Boolean value describes if browser monitors will be executed on this location:</p> <ul> <li><code>false</code>: Browser monitor executions disabled.</li> <li><code>true</code>: Browser monitor executions enabled.</li> </ul>  |
|city|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The city of the location. |
|countryCode|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|<p>The country code of the location.</p> <p>To fetch the list of available country codes, use the <a href="https://dt-url.net/37030go" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" >GET all countries</a> request.</p>  |
|countryName|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The country name of the location. |
|deploymentType|"UNKNOWN" &#124; "KUBERNETES" &#124; "OPENSHIFT" &#124; "STANDARD"|<p>The deployment type of the location:</p> <ul> <li><code>STANDARD</code>: The location is deployed on Windows or Linux.</li> <li><code>KUBERNETES</code>: The location is deployed on Kubernetes.</li> </ul>  |
|entityId|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The Dynatrace entity ID of the location. |
|fipsMode|"ENABLED" &#124; "DISABLED" &#124; "ENABLED_WITH_CORPORATE_PROXY"|<p>Containerized location property indicating whether FIPS mode is enabled on this location:</p> <ul> <li><code>DISABLED</code>: FIPS is not enabled on the location.</li> <li><code>ENABLED</code>: FIPS is enabled on the location.</li> <li><code>ENABLED_WITH_CORPORATE_PROXY</code>: FIPS with corporate proxy is enabled on this location. Default: DISABLED</li> </ul>  |
|geoLocationId|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The Dynatrace GeoLocation ID of the location. |
|latitude<sup>*required</sup>|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The latitude of the location in <code>DDD.dddd</code> format. |
|locationNodeOutageDelayInMinutes|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|Alert if location or node outage lasts longer than <em>X</em> minutes. \\n\\n Only applicable when <code>availabilityLocationOutage</code> or <code>availabilityNodeOutage</code> is set to <code>true</code>. Supported only for private Synthetic locations. |
|longitude<sup>*required</sup>|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The longitude of the location in <code>DDD.dddd</code> format. |
|namExecutionSupported|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|<p>Containerized location property. Boolean value describes if icmp monitors will be executed on this location:</p> <ul> <li><code>false</code>: Icmp monitor executions disabled.</li> <li><code>true</code>: Icmp monitor executions enabled.</li> </ul>  |
|name<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The name of the location. |
|nodeNames|<a href="#privatesyntheticlocationnodenames" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">PrivateSyntheticLocationNodeNames</a>|A mapping id to name of the nodes belonging to the location. |
|nodes<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|<p>A list of synthetic nodes belonging to the location.</p> <p>You can retrieve the list of available nodes with the <a href="https://dt-url.net/miy3rpl" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" >GET all nodes</a> call.</p>  |
|regionCode|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|<p>The region code of the location.</p> <p>To fetch the list of available region codes, use the <a href="https://dt-url.net/az230x0" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" >GET regions of the country</a> request.</p>  |
|regionName|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The region name of the location. |
|status|"ENABLED" &#124; "DISABLED" &#124; "HIDDEN"|<p>The status of the location:</p> <ul> <li><code>ENABLED</code>: The location is displayed as active in the UI. You can assign monitors to the location.</li> <li><code>DISABLED</code>: The location is displayed as inactive in the UI. You can't assign monitors to the location. Monitors already assigned to the location will stay there and will be executed from the location.</li> <li><code>HIDDEN</code>: The location is not displayed in the UI. You can't assign monitors to the location. You can only set location as <code>HIDDEN</code> when no monitor is assigned to it.</li> </ul>  |
|type<sup>*required</sup>|"CLUSTER" &#124; "PUBLIC" &#124; "PRIVATE"| |
|useNewKubernetesVersion|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|<p>Containerized location property. Boolean value describes which kubernetes version will be used:</p> <ul> <li><code>false</code>: Version 1.23+ that is older than 1.26</li> <li><code>true</code>: Version 1.26+.</li> </ul>  |

### PrivateSyntheticLocationNodeNames

A mapping id to name of the nodes belonging to the location.

**type**: Record&lt;string, string&gt;

### Problem

The properties of a problem.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|affectedEntities<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;<a href="#entitystub">EntityStub</a>&gt;|A list of all entities that are affected by the problem. |
|displayId<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The display ID of the problem. |
|endTime<sup>*required</sup>|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|<p>The end timestamp of the problem, in UTC milliseconds.</p> <p>Has <code>-1</code> value, if the problem is still open.</p>  |
|entityTags|Array&lt;<a href="#metag" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">METag</a>&gt;|A list of all entity tags of the problem. |
|evidenceDetails|<a href="#evidencedetails">EvidenceDetails</a>|The evidence details of a problem. |
|impactAnalysis|<a href="#impactanalysis" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">ImpactAnalysis</a>|A list of all impacts of the problem. |
|impactLevel<sup>*required</sup>|"ENVIRONMENT" &#124; "APPLICATION" &#124; "INFRASTRUCTURE" &#124; "SERVICES"|The impact level of the problem. It shows what is affected by the problem. |
|impactedEntities<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;<a href="#entitystub">EntityStub</a>&gt;|A list of all entities that are impacted by the problem. |
|k8s.cluster.name|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|The related Kubernetes cluster names. |
|k8s.cluster.uid|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|The related Kubernetes cluster UIDs. |
|k8s.namespace.name|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|The related Kubernetes namespace names. |
|linkedProblemInfo|<a href="#linkedproblem" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">LinkedProblem</a>|The properties of the linked problem. |
|managementZones<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;<a href="#managementzone">ManagementZone</a>&gt;|A list of all management zones that the problem belongs to. |
|problemFilters<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;<a href="#alertingprofilestub" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">AlertingProfileStub</a>&gt;|A list of alerting profiles that match the problem. |
|problemId<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The ID of the problem. |
|recentComments|<a href="#commentslist">CommentsList</a>|A list of comments. |
|rootCauseEntity|<a href="#entitystub" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">EntityStub</a>|A short representation of a monitored entity. |
|severityLevel<sup>*required</sup>|"CUSTOM_ALERT" &#124; "AVAILABILITY" &#124; "ERROR" &#124; "INFO" &#124; "MONITORING_UNAVAILABLE" &#124; "PERFORMANCE" &#124; "RESOURCE_CONTENTION"|The severity of the problem. |
|startTime<sup>*required</sup>|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The start timestamp of the problem, in UTC milliseconds. |
|status<sup>*required</sup>|"CLOSED" &#124; "OPEN"|The status of the problem. |
|title<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The name of the problem, displayed in the UI. |

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|message<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The text of the closing comment. |

The result of closing a problem.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|closeTimestamp<sup>*required</sup>|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The timestamp when the user triggered the closing. |
|closing<sup>*required</sup>|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|True, if the problem is being closed. |
|comment|<a href="#comment">Comment</a>|The comment to a problem. |
|problemId<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The ID of the problem. |

### Problems

A list of problems.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|nextPageKey|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|<p>The cursor for the next page of results. Has the value of <code>null</code> on the last page.</p> <p>Use it in the <strong>nextPageKey</strong> query parameter to obtain subsequent pages of the result.</p>  |
|pageSize|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The number of entries per page. |
|problems<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;<a href="#problem" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Problem</a>&gt;|The result entries. |
|totalCount<sup>*required</sup>|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The total number of entries in the result. |
|warnings|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|A list of warnings |

### ProcessGroupVulnerableFunctions

The vulnerable functions of a process group including their usage.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|functionsInUse|Array&lt;<a href="#vulnerablefunction">VulnerableFunction</a>&gt;|A list of vulnerable functions in use. |
|functionsNotAvailable|Array&lt;<a href="#vulnerablefunction" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">VulnerableFunction</a>&gt;|A list of vulnerable functions with unknown state. |
|functionsNotInUse|Array&lt;<a href="#vulnerablefunction">VulnerableFunction</a>&gt;|A list of vulnerable functions not in use. |
|processGroup|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The process group identifier. |

### PropertyDefinition

Configuration of a property in a settings schema.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|constraints|Array&lt;<a href="#constraint" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Constraint</a>&gt;|A list of constraints limiting the values to be accepted. |
|datasource|<a href="#datasourcedefinition">DatasourceDefinition</a>|Configuration of a datasource for a property. |
|default|AnyValue|<p>The default value to be used when no value is provided.</p> <p>If a non-singleton has the value of <code>null</code>, it means an empty collection.</p>  |
|description|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|A short description of the property. |
|displayName|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The display name of the property. |
|documentation|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|An extended description and/or links to documentation. |
|forceSecretResubmission|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Defines if value is allowed to be modified when secret properties are not |
|items|<a href="#item" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Item</a>|An item of a collection property. |
|maxObjects<sup>*required</sup>|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|<p>The maximum number of <strong>objects</strong> in a collection property.</p> <p>Has the value of <code>1</code> for singletons.</p>  |
|metadata|<a href="#propertydefinitionmetadata">PropertyDefinitionMetadata</a>|Metadata of the property. |
|migrationPattern|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|Pattern with references to properties to create a new value. |
|minObjects|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The minimum number of <strong>objects</strong> in a collection property. |
|modificationPolicy|"DEFAULT" &#124; "ALWAYS" &#124; "NEVER"|Modification policy of the property. |
|nullable<sup>*required</sup>|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|The value can (<code>true</code>) or can't (<code>false</code>) be <code>null</code>. |
|precondition|<a href="#precondition" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Precondition</a>|A precondition for visibility of a property. |
|referencedType|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The type referenced by the property value |
|subType|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The subtype of the property's value. |
|type<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String) &#124; <a href="#refpointer">RefPointer</a>|The type of the property's value. |
|uiCustomization|<a href="#uicustomization" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">UiCustomization</a>|Customization for UI elements |

### PropertyDefinitionMetadata

Metadata of the property.

**type**: Record&lt;string, string&gt;

### PublicCertificateCredentials

A credentials set of the `PUBLIC_CERTIFICATE` type.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|allowContextlessRequests|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Allow ad-hoc functions to access the credential details (requires the APP_ENGINE scope). |
|allowedEntities|Array&lt;<a href="#credentialaccessdata" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">CredentialAccessData</a>&gt;|The set of entities allowed to use the credential. |
|certificate<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The certificate in the string format. |
|certificateFormat<sup>*required</sup>|"UNKNOWN" &#124; "PEM" &#124; "PKCS12"|The certificate format. |
|description|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|A short description of the credentials set. |
|id|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The ID of the credentials set. |
|name<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The name of the credentials set. |
|ownerAccessOnly|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|The credentials set is available to every user (<code>false</code>) or to owner only (<code>true</code>). |
|password<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The password of the credential (not supported). |
|~~scope~~<sup>**DEPRECATED**</sup>|"EXTENSION" &#124; "SYNTHETIC" &#124; "APP_ENGINE"|The scope of the credentials set. |
|scopes<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;"EXTENSION" &#124; "SYNTHETIC" &#124; "APP_ENGINE"&gt;|<p>The set of scopes of the credentials set.</p> <p>Limitations: <code>CredentialsScope.APP_ENGINE</code> is only available on the new Dynatrace SaaS platform - it's not available on managed or non-Grail SaaS environments.</p>  |
|type<sup>*required</sup>|"CERTIFICATE" &#124; "PUBLIC_CERTIFICATE" &#124; "TOKEN" &#124; "USERNAME_PASSWORD" &#124; "AWS_MONITORING_KEY_BASED" &#124; "AWS_MONITORING_ROLE_BASED" &#124; "SNMPV3"|<p>Defines the actual set of fields depending on the value. See one of the following objects:</p> <ul> <li><code>CERTIFICATE</code> -&gt; CertificateCredentials</li> <li><code>PUBLIC_CERTIFICATE</code> -&gt; PublicCertificateCredentials</li> <li><code>USERNAME_PASSWORD</code> -&gt; UserPasswordCredentials</li> <li><code>TOKEN</code> -&gt; TokenCredentials</li> <li><code>SNMPV3</code> -&gt; SNMPV3Credentials</li> <li><code>AWS_MONITORING_KEY_BASED</code> -&gt; AWSKeyBasedCredentialsDto</li> <li><code>AWS_MONITORING_ROLE_BASED</code> -&gt; AWSRoleBasedCredentials</li> </ul>  |

### PublicSyntheticLocation

Configuration of a public synthetic location.

 Some fields are inherited from the base *SyntheticLocation* object.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|browserType<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The type of the browser the location is using to execute browser monitors. |
|browserVersion<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The version of the browser the location is using to execute browser monitors. |
|capabilities|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|A list of location capabilities. |
|city|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The city of the location. |
|cloudPlatform<sup>*required</sup>|"AZURE" &#124; "ALIBABA" &#124; "GOOGLE_CLOUD" &#124; "OTHER" &#124; "AMAZON_EC2" &#124; "DYNATRACE_CLOUD" &#124; "INTEROUTE" &#124; "UNDEFINED"|The cloud provider where the location is hosted. |
|countryCode|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|<p>The country code of the location.</p> <p>To fetch the list of available country codes, use the <a href="https://dt-url.net/37030go" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" >GET all countries</a> request.</p>  |
|countryName|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The country name of the location. |
|entityId|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The Dynatrace entity ID of the location. |
|geoLocationId|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The Dynatrace GeoLocation ID of the location. |
|ips<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|The list of IP addresses assigned to the location. |
|latitude<sup>*required</sup>|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The latitude of the location in <code>DDD.dddd</code> format. |
|longitude<sup>*required</sup>|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The longitude of the location in <code>DDD.dddd</code> format. |
|name<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The name of the location. |
|regionCode|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|<p>The region code of the location.</p> <p>To fetch the list of available region codes, use the <a href="https://dt-url.net/az230x0" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" >GET regions of the country</a> request.</p>  |
|regionName|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The region name of the location. |
|stage<sup>*required</sup>|"BETA" &#124; "COMING_SOON" &#124; "DELETED" &#124; "GA"|The stage of the location. |
|status|"ENABLED" &#124; "DISABLED" &#124; "HIDDEN"|<p>The status of the location:</p> <ul> <li><code>ENABLED</code>: The location is displayed as active in the UI. You can assign monitors to the location.</li> <li><code>DISABLED</code>: The location is displayed as inactive in the UI. You can't assign monitors to the location. Monitors already assigned to the location will stay there and will be executed from the location.</li> <li><code>HIDDEN</code>: The location is not displayed in the UI. You can't assign monitors to the location. You can only set location as <code>HIDDEN</code> when no monitor is assigned to it.</li> </ul>  |
|type<sup>*required</sup>|"CLUSTER" &#124; "PUBLIC" &#124; "PRIVATE"|<p>Defines the actual set of fields depending on the value. See one of the following objects:</p> <ul> <li><code>PUBLIC</code> -&gt; PublicSyntheticLocation</li> <li><code>PRIVATE</code> -&gt; PrivateSyntheticLocation</li> <li><code>CLUSTER</code> -&gt; PrivateSyntheticLocation</li> </ul>  |

### RelatedAttacksList

A list of related attacks of the security problem.

Related attacks are attacks on the exposed security problem.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|attacks|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|A list of related attack ids. |

### RelatedContainerImage

Related container image of a security problem.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|affectedEntities|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|A list of affected entities. |
|imageId|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The image ID of the related container image. |
|imageName|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The image name of the related container image. |
|numberOfAffectedEntities|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The number of affected entities. |

### RelatedContainerList

A list of related container images.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|containerImages|Array&lt;<a href="#relatedcontainerimage">RelatedContainerImage</a>&gt;|A list of related container images. |

### RelatedEntitiesList

A list of related entities of the security problem.

A related entity is a monitored entity that is directly or indirectly related to an *affected entity* (for example, it could be a host where an affected process runs).

Each related entity contains a list of corresponding affected entities (for example, an affected process running on this host).

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|applications|Array&lt;<a href="#relatedentity" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">RelatedEntity</a>&gt;|A list of related applications. |
|databases|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|A list of related databases. |
|hosts|Array&lt;<a href="#relatedentity">RelatedEntity</a>&gt;|A list of related hosts. |
|kubernetesClusters|Array&lt;<a href="#relatedentity" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">RelatedEntity</a>&gt;|A list of related Kubernetes clusters. |
|kubernetesWorkloads|Array&lt;<a href="#relatedentity">RelatedEntity</a>&gt;|A list of related Kubernetes workloads. |
|services|Array&lt;<a href="#relatedservice" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">RelatedService</a>&gt;|A list of related services. |

### RelatedEntity

An entity related to a security problem.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|affectedEntities|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|A list of affected entities related to the entity. |
|id|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The Dynatrace entity ID of the entity. |
|numberOfAffectedEntities|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The number of affected entities related to the entity. |

### RelatedService

A service related to a security problem.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|affectedEntities|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|A list of affected entities related to the entity. |
|exposure|"NOT_AVAILABLE" &#124; "NOT_DETECTED" &#124; "PUBLIC_NETWORK"|The level of exposure of the service. |
|id|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The Dynatrace entity ID of the entity. |
|numberOfAffectedEntities|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The number of affected entities related to the entity. |

### Release

Contains data related to a single release of a component.
A Release is a combination of a component and a version.
A Component can be any form of deployable that can be associated with a version.
In the first draft, a Component is always a Service.

The tuple &lt;name, product, stage, version&gt; is always unique.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|affectedByProblems|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|The entity has one or more problems |
|affectedBySecurityVulnerabilities|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|The entity has one or more security vulnerabilities |
|instances|Array&lt;<a href="#releaseinstance">ReleaseInstance</a>&gt;|The instances entityIds included in this release |
|name|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The entity name |
|problemCount|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The number of problems of the entity |
|product|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The product name |
|releaseEntityId|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The entity id of correlating release. |
|running|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|The related PGI is still running/monitored |
|securityVulnerabilitiesCount|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The number of security vulnerabilities of the entity |
|securityVulnerabilitiesEnabled|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Indicates that the security vulnerabilities feature is enabled |
|softwareTechs|Array&lt;<a href="#softwaretechs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">SoftwareTechs</a>&gt;|The software technologies of the release |
|stage|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The stage name |
|throughput|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The count of bytes per second of the entity |
|version|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The identified release version |

### ReleaseInstance

Contains data related to a single instance of a release.
An instance is a Process Group Instance and has an optional build version.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|buildVersion|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The build version |
|entityId|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The entity id of the instance. |
|problems|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|List of event Ids of open problems |
|securityVulnerabilities|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|List of Security vulnerabilities Ids |

### Releases

A list of releases.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|nextPageKey|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|<p>The cursor for the next page of results. Has the value of <code>null</code> on the last page.</p> <p>Use it in the <strong>nextPageKey</strong> query parameter to obtain subsequent pages of the result.</p>  |
|pageSize|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The number of entries per page. |
|releases|Array&lt;<a href="#release">Release</a>&gt;|A list of releases. |
|releasesWithProblems|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|Number of releases with problems. |
|totalCount<sup>*required</sup>|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The total number of entries in the result. |

### RemediationAssessment

Assessment of the remediation item.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|assessmentAccuracy|"NOT_AVAILABLE" &#124; "FULL" &#124; "REDUCED"|The accuracy of the assessment. |
|assessmentAccuracyDetails|<a href="#assessmentaccuracydetails" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">AssessmentAccuracyDetails</a>|The assessment accuracy details. |
|dataAssets|"NOT_AVAILABLE" &#124; "NOT_DETECTED" &#124; "REACHABLE"|The reachability of related data assets by affected entities. |
|exposure|"NOT_AVAILABLE" &#124; "NOT_DETECTED" &#124; "PUBLIC_NETWORK"|The level of exposure of affected entities. |
|numberOfDataAssets|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The number of related data assets. |
|vulnerableFunctionRestartRequired|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Whether a restart is required for the latest vulnerable function data. |
|vulnerableFunctionUsage|"NOT_AVAILABLE" &#124; "IN_USE" &#124; "NOT_IN_USE"|The usage of vulnerable functions |
|vulnerableFunctionsInUse|Array&lt;<a href="#vulnerablefunction">VulnerableFunction</a>&gt;|A list of vulnerable functions that are in use. |
|vulnerableFunctionsNotAvailable|Array&lt;<a href="#vulnerablefunction" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">VulnerableFunction</a>&gt;|A list of vulnerable functions that are not available. |
|vulnerableFunctionsNotInUse|Array&lt;<a href="#vulnerablefunction">VulnerableFunction</a>&gt;|A list of vulnerable functions that are not in use. |

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|assessment|<a href="#remediationassessment" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">RemediationAssessment</a>|Assessment of the remediation item. |
|entityIds|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;| |
|firstAffectedTimestamp|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)| |
|id|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)| |
|muteState|<a href="#remediationitemmutestate">RemediationItemMuteState</a>|The mute state of a remediation item of a security problem. |
|name|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)| |
|remediationProgress|<a href="#remediationprogress" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">RemediationProgress</a>|The progress of this remediation item. It contains affected and unaffected entities. |
|resolvedTimestamp|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)| |
|trackingLink|<a href="#trackinglink">TrackingLink</a>|External tracking link URL associated with the remediable entity of the security problem. |
|vulnerabilityState|"RESOLVED" &#124; "VULNERABLE"| |
|vulnerableComponents|Array&lt;<a href="#remediationitemdetailsvulnerablecomponent" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">RemediationItemDetailsVulnerableComponent</a>&gt;|<p>A list of vulnerable components of the remediation item.</p> <p>A vulnerable component is what causes the security problem.</p>  |

### RemediationItem

A possible remediation for a security problem.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|assessment|<a href="#remediationassessment">RemediationAssessment</a>|Assessment of the remediation item. |
|entityIds|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;| |
|firstAffectedTimestamp|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)| |
|id|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)| |
|muteState|<a href="#remediationitemmutestate" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">RemediationItemMuteState</a>|The mute state of a remediation item of a security problem. |
|name|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)| |
|remediationProgress|<a href="#remediationprogress">RemediationProgress</a>|The progress of this remediation item. It contains affected and unaffected entities. |
|resolvedTimestamp|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)| |
|trackingLink|<a href="#trackinglink" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">TrackingLink</a>|External tracking link URL associated with the remediable entity of the security problem. |
|vulnerabilityState|"RESOLVED" &#124; "VULNERABLE"| |
|vulnerableComponents|Array&lt;<a href="#vulnerablecomponent">VulnerableComponent</a>&gt;|<p>A list of vulnerable components of the remediation item.</p> <p>A vulnerable component is what causes the security problem.</p>  |

### RemediationItemDetailsVulnerableComponent

A vulnerable component with details for a remediation item (PG).

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|affectedEntities|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|A list of affected entities. |
|displayName|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The display name of the vulnerable component. |
|fileName|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The file name of the vulnerable component. |
|id|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The Dynatrace entity ID of the vulnerable component. |

|shortName|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The short, component-only name of the vulnerable component. |

### RemediationItemMuteState

The mute state of a remediation item of a security problem.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|comment|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|A short comment about the most recent mute state change. |
|lastUpdatedTimestamp|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The timestamp (UTC milliseconds) of the last update of the mute state. |
|muted|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|The remediation is (<code>true</code>) or is not (<code>false</code>) muted. |
|reason|"OTHER" &#124; "AFFECTED" &#124; "CONFIGURATION_NOT_AFFECTED" &#124; "FALSE_POSITIVE" &#124; "IGNORE" &#124; "INITIAL_STATE" &#124; "VULNERABLE_CODE_NOT_IN_USE"|The reason for the most recent mute state change. |
|user|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The user who last changed the mute state. |

### RemediationItemMuteStateChange

An updated configuration of the remediation item&apos;s mute state.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|comment<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|A comment about the mute state change reason. |
|muted<sup>*required</sup>|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|The desired mute state of the remediation item. |
|reason<sup>*required</sup>|"OTHER" &#124; "AFFECTED" &#124; "CONFIGURATION_NOT_AFFECTED" &#124; "FALSE_POSITIVE" &#124; "IGNORE" &#124; "INITIAL_STATE" &#124; "VULNERABLE_CODE_NOT_IN_USE"|The reason for the mute state change. |

### RemediationItemMutingSummary

Summary of (un-)muting a remediation item.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|muteStateChangeTriggered<sup>*required</sup>|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Whether a mute state change for the given remediation item was triggered by this request. |
|reason|"ALREADY_MUTED" &#124; "ALREADY_UNMUTED" &#124; "REMEDIATION_ITEM_NOT_AFFECTED_BY_GIVEN_SECURITY_PROBLEM"|Contains a reason, in case the requested operation was not executed. |
|remediationItemId<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The id of the remediation item that will be (un-)muted. |

### RemediationItemsBulkMute

Information on muting several remediation items.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|comment|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|A comment about the muting reason. |
|reason<sup>*required</sup>|"OTHER" &#124; "CONFIGURATION_NOT_AFFECTED" &#124; "FALSE_POSITIVE" &#124; "IGNORE" &#124; "VULNERABLE_CODE_NOT_IN_USE"|The reason for muting the remediation items. |
|remediationItemIds<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|The ids of the remediation items to be muted. |

### RemediationItemsBulkMuteResponse

Response of muting several remediation items.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|summary<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;<a href="#remediationitemmutingsummary">RemediationItemMutingSummary</a>&gt;|The summary of which remediation items were muted and which already were muted previously. |

### RemediationItemsBulkUnmute

Information on un-muting several remediation items.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|comment|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|A comment about the un-muting reason. |
|reason<sup>*required</sup>|"AFFECTED"|The reason for un-muting the remediation items. |
|remediationItemIds<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|The ids of the remediation items to be un-muted. |

### RemediationItemsBulkUnmuteResponse

Response of un-muting several remediation items.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|summary<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;<a href="#remediationitemmutingsummary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">RemediationItemMutingSummary</a>&gt;|The summary of which remediation items were un-muted and which already were un-muted previously. |

### RemediationItemsBulkUpdateDeleteDto

Contains the external tracking link associations to be applied to the remediation items of the security problem.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|deletes|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|<p>Tracking links to remove from the security problem.</p> <p>List of remediation item IDs of the security problem for which to remove the tracking links.</p>  |
|updates|<a href="#remediationitemsbulkupdatedeletedtoupdates">RemediationItemsBulkUpdateDeleteDtoUpdates</a>|<p>Tracking links to set for the security problem.</p> <p>Map of remediation item ID to tracking link objects.</p> <p>Keys must be valid remediation item IDs of the security problem, the associated value must contain the link to set for the item.</p>  |

### RemediationItemsBulkUpdateDeleteDtoUpdates

Tracking links to set for the security problem.

Map of remediation item ID to tracking link objects.

Keys must be valid remediation item IDs of the security problem, the associated value must contain the link to set for the item.

**type**: Record&lt;string, TrackingLinkUpdate&gt;

### RemediationProgress

The progress of this remediation item. It contains affected and unaffected entities.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|affectedEntities|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|A list of related entities that are affected by the security problem. |
|unaffectedEntities|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|A list of related entities that are affected by the security problem. |

### RemediationProgressEntity

An affected or unaffected entity of a remediation for a security problem.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|assessment|<a href="#remediationprogressentityassessment" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">RemediationProgressEntityAssessment</a>|Assessment of the remediation progress entity. |
|firstAffectedTimestamp|[number](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Number)|The timestamp when the remediation progress entity has first been related to the vulnerability. |
|id|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The ID of the remediation progress entity. |
|name|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The name of the remediation progress entity. |
|state|"AFFECTED" &#124; "UNAFFECTED"|The current state of the remediation progress entity. |
|vulnerableComponents|Array&lt;<a href="#remediationprogressvulnerablecomponent">RemediationProgressVulnerableComponent</a>&gt;|<p>A list of vulnerable components of the remediation item.</p> <p>A vulnerable component is what causes the security problem.</p>  |

### RemediationProgressEntityAssessment

Assessment of the remediation progress entity.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|vulnerableFunctionRestartRequired|[boolean](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Boolean)|Whether a restart is required for the latest vulnerable function data. |
|vulnerableFunctionUsage|"NOT_AVAILABLE" &#124; "IN_USE" &#124; "NOT_IN_USE"|The usage of vulnerable functions |
|vulnerableFunctionsInUse|Array&lt;<a href="#vulnerablefunction" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">VulnerableFunction</a>&gt;|A list of vulnerable functions that are in use. |
|vulnerableFunctionsNotAvailable|Array&lt;<a href="#vulnerablefunction">VulnerableFunction</a>&gt;|A list of vulnerable functions that are not available. |
|vulnerableFunctionsNotInUse|Array&lt;<a href="#vulnerablefunction" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">VulnerableFunction</a>&gt;|A list of vulnerable functions that are not in use. |

### RemediationProgressEntityList

A list of remediation progress entities.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|remediationProgressEntities|Array&lt;<a href="#remediationprogressentity">RemediationProgressEntity</a>&gt;|A list of remediation progress entities. |

### RemediationProgressVulnerableComponent

A vulnerable component with details for a remediation progress entity (PGI).

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|displayName|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The display name of the vulnerable component. |
|fileName|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The file name of the vulnerable component. |
|id|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The Dynatrace entity ID of the vulnerable component. |
|loadOrigins|Array&lt;[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)&gt;|The load origins of the vulnerable components. |
|shortName|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The short, component-only name of the vulnerable component. |

|path|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|The request path. |
|protocolDetails|<a href="#protocoldetails">ProtocolDetails</a>|Details that are specific to the used protocol. |
